headline: Taking Stock Of Eversource Energy (ES) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Price Performance
summary: Stock performance snapshot and why Eversource Energy is on investors’ radar Eversource Energy (ES) has attracted fresh attention after recent trading left the stock with a 1 day return of 4.24%, a 7 day decline of 8.80% and a month decline of 7.04%. Over the past 3 months, the stock shows a 0.73% decline, while the 1 year total return stands at 14.49%. Longer term, total returns are 0.74% over 3 years and a 5.61% decline over 5 years.
